entries.title: Resident IPC must remain authoritative in release topology
entries.rationale: Release artifacts must not silently fall back to the legacy process runner.
entries.exit_criteria: Production topology diagnostic, release guard, and release-candidate rehearsal all pass with resident IPC as the only supported production transport.

entries.title: State compatibility fixtures must pass before release promotion
entries.rationale: Receipts, task state, memory state, and assimilation artifacts need explicit upgrade and rollback coverage.
entries.exit_criteria: Fixture validation and live runtime rehearsal both pass for receipts, task state, memory state, and the frozen assimilation support slice.

entries.title: Broader assimilation surface remains experimental outside the frozen v1 slice
entries.rationale: Only the v1 vertical slice is hardened for closure evidence; other assimilation lanes must not be implied as production supported.
entries.exit_criteria: Closure policy, README, and release gates all preserve the frozen slice boundary and classify broader assimilation lanes as experimental.

entries.title: Numeric release thresholds must fail release when regressed
entries.rationale: IPC success rate, receipt completeness, supported command latency, and recovery RTO/RPO must be enforced as real release blockers rather than advisory metrics.
entries.exit_criteria: Release scorecard gate is required by the closure path and fails strict mode when numeric thresholds regress.

entries.title: Operator support bundle must be the single incident truth package
entries.rationale: Incident triage should not require hunting across scattered artifacts once the release closure path has run.
entries.exit_criteria: Support bundle export includes failed release gates, recovery rehearsal, topology diagnostic, release scorecard, and closure artifacts in one package.
